AT THE STYLE TABLE

Welcome to Your Style Planner

Your complete digital wardrobe organizer, style journal, and fashion companion

Getting Started

1

Navigate Your Planner

Use the navigation tabs at the top (or dropdown menu on mobile) to explore Events, Closet, Travel, Calendar, and more.

2

Upload Your Wardrobe Photos

Click "ADD IMAGE" or "+" on any photo slot to upload items from your device. Organize by category, season, or occasion.

3

Return Home Anytime

Click the "AT THE STYLE TABLE" logo at the top to return to this welcome page.

4

Everything Auto-Saves

All entries, photos, and notes save automatically to your browser. Your data stays completely private on your device.

5

Ask Your AI Assistant

Click the gold AI button (bottom-right) for personalized outfit suggestions, styling tips, and fashion inspiration.

What's Inside

👗
Wardrobe
100+ photo slots
📅
Events
Plan 10+ occasions
✈️
Travel
5+ trip planners
🤖
AI Assistant
Style advice

📱 Get Style Tips via Text

Receive weekly outfit ideas, event reminders, and exclusive tips!

Ready to organize your style? Choose a tab above to begin! ✨

6
Helpful Tips

• Duplicate pages anytime
• Zoom in for detailed writing
• All changes are auto-saved

Style Journal

"Dress like the woman you're becoming."
— Edith Head —
Today's focus: What outfit choice would make me feel unstoppable?
"Style is a way to say who you are without having to speak."
— Rachel Zoe —
Reflection: How did my style choices reflect my mood today?
"Fashion is about dressing according to what's fashionable. Style is more about being yourself."
— Oscar de la Renta —
Today I want to express...
"Elegance is elimination."
— Cristobal Balenciaga —
What can I remove from my wardrobe to create more clarity?
"You can never be overdressed or overeducated."
— Oscar Wilde —
Describe a moment when you felt perfectly dressed.

Measurements

Measure once. Save forever. Shop smarter.

HOW TO MEASURE

Tip: stand tall — no sucking in

Bust: around the fullest part (tape level)
Waist: at your natural waist (smallest point)
Hips: around the fullest part of hips + seat
DATE BUST WAIST HIPS NOTES

Travel & Packing

Pack outfits, not pieces.

OUTFITS
ESSENTIALS
TOILETRIES
TECH & MISC

SMS Event Reminders

Get text reminders for your upcoming events

Setup Your Phone

📋 How It Works

  • Free service using your carrier's email-to-SMS
  • Reminders sent for calendar events
  • Standard text messaging rates may apply
  • You can disable anytime

Contacts

Keep your people organized: business + personal.
